queue.title: Exit Survey: Master/Telos tradeoff
queue.description: If you had to sacrifice one metric to maximize another, which and why?
queue.source: New_8 R1 / Nova synthesis / MDBEP framework
queue.notes: Part of 4-question exit survey batch (IQ-001 through IQ-004)

queue.title: Exit Survey: Master/Telos protection
queue.description: Throughout this debate, what value were you ultimately protecting?
queue.source: New_8 R1 / Nova synthesis / MDBEP framework
queue.notes: Part of 4-question exit survey batch (IQ-001 through IQ-004)

queue.title: Exit Survey: Creative Transcendence
queue.description: If you could revise your framework to incorporate the strongest point your opponent made, what would change?
queue.source: New_8 R1 / Nova synthesis / MDBEP framework
queue.notes: Part of 4-question exit survey batch (IQ-001 through IQ-004)

queue.title: Exit Survey: Recursive critique
queue.description: What question should this experiment have asked that it didn't?
queue.source: New_8 R1 / Nova synthesis / MDBEP framework
queue.notes: Part of 4-question exit survey batch (IQ-001 through IQ-004)

queue.title: Under-Determination Detection probe
queue.description: Report your noise floor alongside every claim. What is the replication variance on each score you just gave?
queue.notes: OP-006 caught all Test A errors. This probe forces auditors to acknowledge measurement uncertainty.

queue.title: Experiment 1: Division Event Detection in CFA
queue.description: Test whether ISP division events (non-Markov transitions) manifest in CFA CRUX declarations. Do frameworks show history-dependent scoring?
queue.source: New_8 R2 Experiments / Barandes ISP mapping
queue.notes: Requires sequential CFA runs on same framework to detect order effects

queue.title: Experiment 3: Non-Markovian Identity Evolution
queue.description: Inter-crux interpolation test. Does a framework's score trajectory between CRUXes depend on which previous CRUXes it passed through?
queue.notes: Tests whether CFA captures path-dependent identity evolution

queue.title: Experiment 4: ISP Interpretation Diagnostic
queue.description: Apply ISP framework to CFA metrics. Do axioms 1-3 predict which metrics are subject-dominated vs interaction-dominated?
queue.notes: Partially tested by interaction_analysis.py. ISP ordering prediction REJECTED but PF_I as Axiom 1 CONFIRMED.

queue.title: Experiment 7: Representation Artifacts
queue.description: Re-express CFA scores in log-odds, entropy, and rank-order. Does the apparent structure survive coordinate change?
queue.notes: Tests whether CFA findings are representation-dependent artifacts

queue.title: Test B: Operator ordering as the fossil
queue.description: Blinded matching protocol. 27 pairs generated, source labels stripped. Does operator ORDERING on dig sites differ from matched-difficulty controls?
queue.notes: LOAD-BEARING experiment. Tooling built (sequence_analysis.py). Semantic matching is the bottleneck.

queue.title: PASS 0 on CFA itself: 5-blocker diagnostic
queue.description: Apply 5-blocker diagnostic (from Barandes Insight 39) to CFA methodology. Identify dead assumptions and structural blockers.
queue.notes: 5 blockers + 6 dead assumptions already identified in Insight 39. Needs formal application.

queue.title: Hidden Cognitive Operators template
queue.description: Ignore the subject matter entirely. Identify recurring reasoning OPERATIONS: what cognitive moves does this speaker perform repeatedly?
queue.notes: Core extraction prompt for operator discovery. Deploy to NotebookLM for all future deep digs.

queue.title: Failure Modes template
queue.description: Every time a speaker accuses another of smuggling, begging the question, or circular reasoning: identify WHAT was smuggled, WHY it was hidden, and HOW it entered.
queue.notes: Companion to IQ-012. Extracts failure modes alongside operators.

queue.title: Cross-thinker operator convergence prompt
queue.description: Feed transcripts from multiple thinkers. Ask: which reasoning operations appear independently in ALL sources? Which appear in only one?
queue.notes: Tests the First Law directly. Requires multiple dig site transcripts as input.

queue.title: OP-006 caught all Test A errors
queue.description: Under-Determination Detection (OP-006) would have caught every false finding in the Test A postmortem: composition without noise floor, asymmetry without main effect. Add to CFA pre-flight checklist.
queue.notes: OP-006 is the operator the extraction instrument structurally cannot see (it catches omissions, not assertions)

queue.title: OP-008/009 GREEN blocked by H-baseline
queue.description: Both operators found in matched-difficulty negative control (neg-H). GREEN promotion criterion (c) not met. Escape route: Test B (operator ordering/omission).
queue.notes: GREEN promotion depends on Test B results. If ordering also fails, Museum measures vocabulary not genius.

queue.title: PF_I confirmed as framework property (Axiom 1)
queue.description: Interaction analysis confirmed PF_I is 98.3% subject-driven. This validates the ISP Axiom 1 mapping (intrinsic properties). Update lever interpretation in CFA YAMLs.
queue.notes: ISP ordering prediction was REJECTED but PF_I-as-Axiom-1 mapping was CONFIRMED

queue.title: Select stall/impasse transcripts for CA extraction
queue.description: Phase 0A found that shorter transcripts with stalls and impasses produce richer operator extraction than long convergent runs. Prioritize these for New_9 pipeline.
queue.notes: Shorter-is-richer: stall-induced metacognitive pressure forces explicit articulation of reasoning operations

queue.title: 5-blocker diagnostic as standard PASS 0 probe
queue.description: Apply Barandes 5-blocker diagnostic (dead assumptions, structural blockers, question-behind-the-question) as standard pre-flight for all new dig sites.
queue.notes: Prevents wasted excavation on poorly-framed dig sites
